item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 873
item.description:
1

20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Aaron Taylor-Johnson
"Live a balanced life. Learn some and think some, and draw and paint and sing and dance and play and work every day some." -Robert Fulghum So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.*
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Happy Pride Everybody!
item.description:
Here's to 18 Years as AlsoAshley, and 3 Years fully out as Ash :D
Thank you all for continuing to make me journey one I treasure and feel lucky enough to share with all of you here.

item.title: Trump’s National Park overhaul backfires again as judge demands sites be restored.
item.description:
A federal judge has ordered the Trump administration to reinstate exhibits and displays at national museums, parks and landmarks that were altered under an executive order.
https://www.msn.com/en-gb/news/uknews/trump-national-park-overhaul-backfires-again-as-judge-reverses-changes/ar-AA25zqWK?ocid=BingNewsVerp
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: She was not happy to walk in the rain
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Nostalgia dump
item.description:
These little indicators on the batteries worked but you had to press so hard that it would hurt your thumbs.
These canisters were used for film (and weed).
AOL is still around.
Speakers with belly buttons. One of them was always broke.
These book plates or checkout cards were in the front of all school books and library books.
Screen saver you could watch for hours.
Did plenty of time in McPrison.
These were in most walmarts
One of the first search engines I used. Is Ixquick still around?
Ashtrays everywhere. Didn't seem to matter, the sides of the road were littered with cigarette butts.
Speaking of cigarettes, Marlboro miles was a popular thing. Send in so many box tabs from your cigarette packs and you could get stuff. My mom got me a TV, and I still have a sweater my dad got.
The original Nemo. This was a trippy movie, and the video game was pretty good.
Sandy tax
item.dc:creator: wiggyswilderness

item.title: Fuck It, Dude. Let's Go Bowling.
item.description: MFA Bowl in Ilkeston, Derbyshire June 12 2026
item.dc:creator: youtinybrainedwipersofotherpeoplesbottoms

item.title: More Right-Wing Losers
item.description: Chad R. Essert, 44 — Chief of Police for the Village of Bethel, Ohio, and registered Republican — was indicted by a Clermont County Grand Jury on 56 counts of s*xual battery and 14 counts of unlawful s*xual conduct with a minor, all third-degree felonies. The alleged abuse spans from 2005 to 2010, when Essert was instructing students at the Young Marines program and Scarlet Oaks career-development center in Sharonville, Ohio. A victim told investigators the abuse occurred across multiple locations in Clermont and Hamilton counties over that five-year period. Sauce: https://www.wfla.com/news/pinellas-county/ohio-police-chief-arrested-in-pinellas-county-on-70-counts-of-sex-crimes-officials/amp/
item.dc:creator: ten80pee

Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @DerpyVaz, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @aRootinaTootin, @Gorgoror, @kaeldra, @MooreBeers, @cloverleafbane, @Crapmonster ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
